body_excerpt: In SetLogicalToPhysicalSlotPortMapping::onRequest of commands.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
